message.advanced-economics.open_hint: Appuyez sur N pour ouvrir Advanced Economics. La touche peut être changée dans les contrôles.
screen.advanced-economics.title: Advanced Economics
screen.advanced-economics.footer.shop: Shop: buy unlocked items or unlock new ones
screen.advanced-economics.footer.sell: Sell: current commands sell held items or your full inventory
screen.advanced-economics.footer.wallet: Wallet: send money to another player
screen.advanced-economics.footer.invest: Invest: deposits grow 1% each Minecraft day
screen.advanced-economics.footer.unlocks: Unlocks: found or paid items become buyable
screen.advanced-economics.footer.quests: Quests: daily tasks, profession choice, and profession work
screen.advanced-economics.footer.setting: Settings: operator toggles for major Advanced Economics systems
screen.advanced-economics.footer.gamble: Gamble: 40% chance to double the held stack, loss destroys it
screen.advanced-economics.wallet.help: Send has 5% fee. Teleport costs $1500.00. Duel stakes both players.
screen.advanced-economics.invest.term_he: 7d fixed deposit button uses the amount field.
screen.advanced-economics.gamble.title: Recent Rolls
screen.advanced-economics.gamble.help: Objet : 40% de victoire. Argent : 45%, mise doublée.
screen.advanced-economics.description.sh: Achetez les objets débloqués. Les objets verrouillés doivent être trouvés une fois ou débloqués avec de l’argent.
screen.advanced-economics.description.se: Les prix de vente utilisent le bonus de métier. L’offre du jour donne une vente x2 à un type d’objet.
screen.advanced-economics.description.wa: Envoyer de l’argent coûte 5% de frais. La téléportation coûte $1500. Les duels donnent les deux mises à un gagnant aléatoire.
screen.advanced-economics.description.in: Les investissements augmentent chaque jour Minecraft. Dépôt et retrait coûtent 1%.
screen.advanced-economics.description.un: Affiche ce que vous pouvez déjà acheter et ce qui reste verrouillé.
screen.advanced-economics.description.qu: Les quêtes quotidiennes changent par jour du monde. Les quêtes de métier sont des tâches plus grandes.
screen.advanced-economics.description.se: Activez ou désactivez les grands systèmes économiques pour un modpack ou un serveur.
screen.advanced-economics.description.ga: Le pari d’objet peut doubler le stack. Le pari d’argent double la mise en cas de victoire.
screen.advanced-economics.footer.about: Explique les systèmes économiques et les commandes principales.
screen.advanced-economics.description.ab: A full in-game guide for Advanced Economics commands and mechanics.
screen.advanced-economics.description.cr: Project information for modpacks, launchers, and server owners.
screen.advanced-economics.quest.professi: Métier actuel : %s. Bonus : %s%%. Vendez les ressources liées pour passer de 5%% à 25%%. Premier métier gratuit; changer coûte $500.
screen.advanced-economics.about.1: Advanced Economics 3.0 is a world-scoped economy: every world has separate balances, unlocks, jobs, quests, investments, loans, pets, insurance, and history.
screen.advanced-economics.about.2: Shop/Sell: find an item once or unlock it, then buy it. Sell values can be changed by config or datapacks. Buy prices are 4x sell prices.
screen.advanced-economics.about.3: Wallet: send money with a 5% fee, pay $1500 for teleport, and use money duels where both stakes go to a random winner.
screen.advanced-economics.about.4: Investments: normal deposits grow daily. Invest and withdraw fees are 1%. Fixed deposits support 7, 14, and 30 day terms.
screen.advanced-economics.about.5: Professions: first job is free. Matching sales start at 5% bonus and grow to 25%. Changing job costs $500.
screen.advanced-economics.about.6: Quests: daily quests reset by world day. Profession quests are larger one-time turn-ins for bigger income.
screen.advanced-economics.about.7: Gamble/Services: gamble held items or money, buy short potion effects, repair, rename, remove enchantments, and trade XP for money.
screen.advanced-economics.about.8: Commands: use /aehelp in chat for the full command list and explanations.
screen.advanced-economics.credits.6: License: Business Source License 1.1, changes to GPL-3.0-or-later on 2030-01-01.
screen.advanced-economics.credits.7: Modpack friendly: config, datapack prices, world saves, language files, and optional JEI/REI/EMI/Mod Menu metadata.
screen.advanced-economics.credits.8: Icon: image.jpg. Economy data is saved per world in advanced-economics/player-data.json.
